body.title: Wire boredom→curiosity motivational loop with milieu competition
body.result: CuriositySource fires when BOREDOM_DETECTED in TWM + no goals active. Intrinsic questions replace watch habits. Milieu nudge +0.12v/+0.15a out-competes boredom -0.08v. Also fires when simply idle.
body.description: Boredom pushes mild negative (exists). Goals pull strong positive (exists). Curiosity should pull medium positive when boredom present + no goals active. CuriositySource must: (1) fire when BOREDOM_DETECTED in TWM, not just when idle, (2) generate intrinsic questions (improve self, read, find gaps), (3) push milieu-affecting positive valence that out-competes boredom. No new mechanism — just wire existing milieu signals.
